files.notes: This file contains four distinct lesson sections for October Guide Lessons, covering Theology/Miracles, Work/Business, Literature (focusing on Martin Luther's hymns), and Social Service (adolescence). Each lesson has clear boundaries with Roman numeral headings and distinct subject matter changes.
